funFacts: The Sea Urchins on Rocky Coral Reef feeds primarily on kelp, acting as a critical regulator of coastal kelp forest density.
Sea Sea Urchins on Rocky Coral Reefs have round, spike-covered shells (tests) made of calcium carbonate plates, protecting them from hungry fish.
